abilities.name: Precision Aura
abilities.description: Grants Drow bonus corresponding to her current. Grants nearby ranged allied units a lesser bonus.

abilities.name: Frost Arrows
abilities.description: Adds a freezing effect to Drow's attacks, slowing enemy movement and dealing bonus damage. Applies an additional stackable hypothermia debuff that increases damage per stack and reduces the values of health restoration sources of the debuff-affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Gust
abilities.description: Releases a wave that applies True Sight, silences, and knocks enemy units back relative to how close they are to the Drow. Grants self bonus movement speed upon cast while repulsing assailants who venture too close.

abilities.name: Multishot
abilities.description: Applies of's corresponding ability level when acquired.

abilities.name: Glacier
abilities.description: Drow creates a hill of ice beneath her, knocking away nearby enemies. Units on the hill gain flying vision and Drow and her ranged allies gain bonus attack range. Drow gains additional damage while on the Glacier and attacking targets below her. The front of the hill obscures vision and cannot be moved through except by Drow. Does not interrupt Multishot when cast.

abilities.name: Marksmanship
abilities.description: Drow's attacks have a chance to ignore the enemy unit's base armor. Enemy heroes too close to Drow automatically disable this effect.
